---
title: "Shap evaluation"
author: "Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

### Set Up Environment

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true"))
library(tidymodels)

path_models <- format_path(str_c("risk2/models/combined"))
path_shared <- format_path(str_c("risk2/data_processed/shared"))
path_input <- format_path(str_c("risk2/chtc/combined"))

devtools::source_url("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/chtc/static_files/fun_chtc.R?raw=true")
```


### Visualize

```{r}
shaps <- read_rds(here::here(path_models, 
                             "shapsgrp_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final.rds"))

labels <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "lapse_labels_24h_day_gps.csv"),
                   show_col_types = FALSE)

dem <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "features_fairness.csv"),
                 show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  select(-ruca1) |> 
  filter(subid %in% labels$subid)
```


## Match `id_obs` to fairness subgroups
```{r}
shap_dem <- labels |> 
  select(id_obs = label_num,
         label = lapse,
         subid) |>
  right_join(shaps, by = c("id_obs")) |> 
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("Lapse", "No lapse"))) |> 
  left_join(dem, by = "subid") |> 
  glimpse()

# nrow(shaps)
# nrow(shap_dem) # should be same as nrow(shaps)
```

## Get top 10 global shaps across sample
```{r}
(shaps_10 <- shaps |> 
  group_by(variable_grp) |>
  summarize(mean_value = mean(abs(value)), .groups = "drop") |> 
  arrange(desc(mean_value)) |> 
  slice_head(n = 10) |> 
   pull(variable_grp))
```

## Plot

```{r}
shap_dem |>
  filter(!is.na(race)) |> 
  mutate(race = factor(race)) |> 
  filter(variable_grp %in% shaps_10) |>
  mutate(variable_grp = factor(variable_grp, levels = shaps_10)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue, y = value, group = race, color = race)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
 # geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 5, bs = "cs"), se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable_grp, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 SHAP Variable Relationships",
    x = "z-score raw feature score",
    y = "Shapley value"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )
```












### Read in test metrics from best model
```{r}
metrics_raw <- 
  read_csv(here::here(path_models, "inner_metrics_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final.csv"),
           show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  glimpse()
```


Pull out single row for best configuration
```{r }
metrics_avg <- metrics_raw |> 
  group_by(algorithm, feature_set, hp1, hp2, hp3, resample) |> 
   summarize(roc_auc = median(roc_auc),
             n_jobs = n(), .groups = "drop") |> 
  relocate(n_jobs) |> 
  arrange(desc(roc_auc)) |> 
  ungroup()

config_best <- metrics_avg |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  print()
```

### Read in training controls and data
```{r}
batch_names <- list.dirs(path_input, full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
batch_names <- batch_names[str_detect(batch_names, "train") & 
                           str_detect(batch_names, "kfold") &
                           str_detect(batch_names, "v10") &
                           str_detect(batch_names, config_best$algorithm) &
                           str_detect(batch_names, "full_final")]
  
batch_name <- batch_names[1] # can source any batch given assumptions above
path_batch <- here::here(path_input, batch_name)
source(here::here(path_batch, "input", "training_controls.R"))
# NOTE: training controls overwrites path_batch but it matches   
path_batch <- here::here(path_input, batch_name)

chunks <- str_split_fixed(data_trn, "\\.", n = Inf) # parse name from extensions
if (length(chunks) == 2) {
  fn <- str_c("data_trn.", chunks[[2]])
} else {
  fn <- str_c("data_trn.", chunks[[2]], ".", chunks[[3]])
}


# open based on file type
if (str_detect(fn, "csv")) {
  d <- read_csv(here::here(path_batch, "input", fn), show_col_types = FALSE) 
} else {
  d <- read_rds(here::here(path_batch, "input", fn))
}
  

d <- format_data(d) |> 
  arrange(label_num) |>
  mutate(id_obs = 1:nrow(d)) 
```

Make recipe and splits
```{r}
splits <- d |> 
    make_splits(cv_resample_type = "kfold", cv_resample = cv_resample, 
                cv_outer_resample = NULL, cv_inner_resample = NULL, 
                cv_group, cv_strat = cv_strat, the_seed = seed_splits)
```


### Fit and Get Interaction function
```{r}
get_fold_shap_interactions <- function(split_obj, id) {

  # training data from rsample split
  train_data <- rsample::analysis(split_obj)

  y <- train_data$y
  X <- train_data |> dplyr::select(-y)

  # convert to matrix for xgboost
  X_mat <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = X)

  # fit model (use your real params here)
  fit <- xgboost::xgboost(
    data = X_mat,
    label = y,
    nrounds = 200,
    max_depth = 3,
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    verbosity = 0
  )

  # SHAP interaction values
  shap_int <- predict(fit, X_mat, predinteraction = TRUE)

  p <- ncol(X_mat)
  dim(shap_int) <- c(nrow(X_mat), p, p)

  feature_names <- colnames(X_mat)

  # pairwise mean absolute interaction
  expand_grid(
    feature1 = feature_names,
    feature2 = feature_names
  ) |>
    filter(feature1 < feature2) |>
    mutate(
      mean_abs_interaction = map2_dbl(
        feature1, feature2,
        ~ mean(abs(shap_int[, .x, .y]))
      ),
      fold = id
    )
}
```


```{r}
interaction_by_fold <- purrr::map2_dfr(
  splits$splits,
  splits$id,
  get_fold_shap_interactions
)
```
